navigation.title: Navigation
navigation.content: Click on a folder to access it. Use the breadcrumb to navigate back.

fileSelection.title: File Selection
fileSelection.content: Check boxes to select files. Use the header checkbox to select all.

download.title: Download
download.content: Select files and click "Download" to retrieve them.

upload.title: Upload
upload.content: Click "Upload" or drag and drop files into the area.

viewModes.title: View Modes
viewModes.content: Switch between list view and card view using the icons in the top right.
